title: Change Deckard power to AoE heal

log.context: Change Deckard power to AoE heal

Everything is built and running. Here is a summary of what changed:

**`/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/combat.ts`:**
- Added `HealEvent` interface (`targetId`, `amount`) and `healEvents` field to `PowerResult`
- Replaced Deckard constants: removed `DECKARD_RADIUS` (48), `DECKARD_DURATION_TICKS`, `DECKARD_SLOW`; added `DECKARD_HEAL_RADIUS` (80), `DECKARD_HEAL_MIN` (0.25), `DECKARD_HEAL_MAX` (0.30)
